Navbar.organization: National Autonomous Union of Sanitation Professionals

Footer.description: National Autonomous Union of Sanitation Professionals of Cameroon. Together for a cleaner Cameroon.

Hero.title: Together for a cleaner and better-sanitized Cameroon.
Hero.description: SYNAPRAC brings together and represents sanitation professionals in Cameroon: septic tank emptying, waste collection, waste treatment and environmental hygiene.

Presentation.title: The voice of sanitation professionals
Presentation.paragraph1: SYNAPRAC brings together sanitation stakeholders around common objectives: professionalizing the sector, defending members' interests and improving people's living environment.
Presentation.paragraph2: Through field actions, training programs and institutional partnerships, the union works every day towards a more structured and recognized sector.

representation.title: Representation
representation.description: Represent sanitation professionals before public institutions.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.description: Build partnerships with local authorities and businesses.

Cta.description: Join a national network that defends your profession and supports your professional development.

2026.title: SYNAPRAC today
2026.text: A national autonomous union with a strengthened digital presence.

history.title: An organization created to unite sanitation professionals

cards.visionText: Ensure the development of sanitation workers by defending their professional, economic, social and moral interests.
cards.engagementText: Bring sanitation professionals together, strengthen their capacities and promote a structured and sustainable profession.
cards.valuesText: Promote a healthy environment based on dignity, fairness, inclusion, safety and sustainability.
cards.objectivesText: Identify sector stakeholders, improve working conditions, develop skills and contribute to better waste management in Cameroon.

bureau.title: The Executive Board
